experience.organization: Seattle Public Schools - Roosevelt High School
responsibilities: Developed and implemented lesson plans for Algebra I and Geometry classes, catering to diverse learning styles and abilities.
Facilitated classroom discussions and activities to promote student engagement and critical thinking skills.
Collaborated with the lead teacher to assess student progress and provide individualized support and feedback.
Attended department meetings and professional development workshops to refine pedagogical techniques.
Provided small group instruction and one-on-one tutoring for students struggling with core scientific concepts.
Assisted in the preparation of laboratory materials and supervised student-led experiments.
Maintained accurate records of student attendance and graded formative assessments to track learning outcomes.
